title: The Schizophrenia
description: The first mod that resembles real schizophrenia.
body:
Here is the English version of the description, optimized with short, concise section titles.

Schizophrenia (Forge 1.21.1)
Developed by XALoEX

Schizophrenia is a psychological horror mod that makes you question the reality of your Minecraft world. This isn't a simple monster chase—your own perception is the enemy. The environment twists, sounds deceive, and the world slowly becomes an oppressive cage.

Features
The Stalker
A dark humanoid entity watching from the shadows.

Stealth: Spawns behind cover 25–40 blocks away; he won't stand in the open.

Aggression: Catching his gaze triggers a scream and a high-speed rush before he vanishes.

Tracking: He learns your frequent locations and moves his hunting grounds closer over time.

Visuals

Pareidolia: Distorted faces appear on blocks and vanish when looked at directly.

Distortions: Random camera shakes, FOV "breathing," and chromatic aberration flashes.

Derealization: Low health triggers a desaturated screen and pixelated static.

Audio

Voices: Over 35 unique chat messages visible only to you ("Look behind you").

Whispers: Entities may call out your specific player name.

Phantom Sounds: Fake TNT hissing, footsteps that mirror your own, and distant explosions.

Heartbeat: A literal thumping sound that intensifies as your health drops.

Paranoia

Mandela Effect: Blocks change behind your back (e.g., Dirt to Soul Sand) and "snap" back when you turn around.

Persecution: Animals and villagers stare at you with tilted heads and follow your movements.

Fake Info: False death messages, join notifications ("Herobrine joined"), and fake achievements.

UI Corruption: Hotbar items visually swap positions to induce panic.

Environment

The Silence: Standard hostile mob spawning is suppressed; the world feels unnervingly empty.

Atmospheric Fog: Thick day fog and pitch-black nights.

Dynamic Light: Holding light sources actively pushes back the darkness in a moving bubble.

Technical
Version: Forge 1.21.1

Config: Toggle features like "Always Stare" in config/schizophrenia-client.toml.

Warning: Includes flashing lights, loud noises, and unsettling themes.
